summary: Updated sioyek custom colors from light sepia to Nord-inspired night mode. The 'w' key now toggles to a soft grey-blue background (#2e3440) with light text (#d8dee9) for comfortable reading in low-light conditions.

artifacts.summary: Updated custom_background_color and custom_text_color to Nord night mode palette
Implementation summary with color change details and verification

completion_data.completion_summary: Configured sioyek 'w' key toggle to use Nord-inspired night mode colors (soft grey-blue background with light text) instead of light sepia, providing comfortable reading in low-light conditions.
